description_long: This is a single-story house situated on a slightly elevated, grassy terrain with a rectangular plot. The house features a prominent gable roof with a central peak and overhanging eaves, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are rendered in a light beige or tan color, with a darker roof and subtle trim details. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and a driveway leads up to the main entrance. A small blue structure, possibly a utility shed or garage, is attached to one side of the house. The surrounding landscape is simple, with no visible fencing or elaborate landscaping.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy plot with a driveway and a small side structure.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the attached blue structure and the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house and the grassy terrain, with the porch roof visible.
description_view_3: Right-rear view emphasizing the blue side structure and the sloped terrain behind the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, and steps leading from the driveway
